changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "Unruly Girl"

TextENGNew: ``...But you're still just as unruly as ever.@k@vS20/13/VTT_akasaka3002. Don't you know how insane it is to jump into an organized crime conflict alone?``
``Ahahaha. Honestly, the original plan was just to conduct reconnaissance, but... things happened.@k@vS20/40/VTT_miyuki3002. Well, we did secure the target, so you can't argue with the results.``
``Unbelievable...``
She may be my daughter, but sometimes I wonder if I did something wrong while raising her. It makes me feel uneasy.
Her boss and her husband would have a pain in their gut if they knew the situation here...
``...Ibuki-kun won't be happy.@k@vS20/13/VTT_akasaka3005. He'll say something like, ``Courage and good sense are admirable, but do something about that reckless side.````
``Perhaps you could say that's fitting for an anti-organized crime detective, but who's to say you'll live that long if you keep charging in without thinking?``
``Ahahaha, Section Chief Ibuki is such a worrywart.@k@vS20/40/VTT_miyuki3004. You know the old saying. Nothing ventured, nothing gained.``
``Even so...``

``Besides,@k@vS20/40/VTT_miyuki3006. I don't want to hear any of this from someone who voluntarily served as the head of shock corps who charged into mafia crime scenes time and time again... Wouldn't you agree, ``Assistant Commissioner`` Akasaka?``
I had no refutation for that.
Moreover, even though she's the one who happily listened to those heroic exploits, it was none other than me who proudly told them to her.
In other words, you reap what you sow...
``...This is hard on Yuuichi-kun, too.@k@vS20/13/VTT_akasaka3010. I feel like having a long talk with him about how he could fall in love with such an unruly girl.``
``Hmm~?@k@vS20/40/VTT_miyuki3008. Back when we announced our engagement, weren't you the one who said, ``You've got a lot of guts...`` with that terrifying look on your face?``
``He still gets nightmares about it, apparently.``
``Th-that's...!@k@vS20/13/VTT_akasaka3012. It's natural for a father to feel that way for his daughter.@k@vS20/13/VTT_akasaka3013. If you ever become a parent, you'll understand the feeling.``
``Yeah yeah, whatever you say.``
Miyuki shrugged her shoulders with an apathetic look on her face, clearly not convinced.
...She was such a bashful little girl in the old days. But nowadays I can't see even a hint of that.
In fact, over the years... it seems like she's become more like my wife Yukie.
``Honestly, you're so much like your mother.@k@vS20/13/VTT_akasaka3015. If she could see you now, she'd burst out crying in her grave.``
``Huh? Dad, what are you talking about?@k@vS20/40/VTT_miyuki3012. You can't just kill Mom like that, even if you're joking around.@k@vS20/40/VTT_miyuki3013. I'm going to tell her later.``
That moment.
I lost my voice, struggling to understand the meaning of what Miyuki just said.
Did Miyuki just say... ``You can't kill her?``
Talking about her like she's still alive...?
``H-hey, Miyuki...@k@vS20/13/VTT_akasaka3018. what did you just say?``
``...Oh, I just remembered.@k@vS20/40/VTT_miyuki3015. Just before leaving, Mom said to give you this medicine.@k@vS20/40/VTT_miyuki3016. Here you go.``

``Enough of this, Dad.@k@vS20/40/VTT_miyuki3018. Even if it's a bother when you run out of medicine, is it really so hard to go to the hospital?@k@vS20/40/VTT_miyuki3019. Mom knows you're busy, but she's really worried.``
``...?@k@vS20/40/VTT_miyuki3021. What's wrong, Dad?``
``Oh, nothing...``
I stared down at the pill case Miyuki handed me while trying to sort out my jumbled thoughts.
...Impossible.
It can't be.
First off, Yukie fell down the stairs and hit her head at the hospital just after giving birth to Miyuki...
Since then, we've spent the past 29 years living without her, struggling to conceal our loneliness and sorrow.
So, there's no way Yukie gave Miyuki this medicine, and there's no chance that she's feeling worried about me...
...Wait a minute.
Hold on, maybe this is just a ``misunderstanding.``
Didn't I call Yukie early this morning?
I told her, ``I'll be home late, so a late-night dinner would be best.``
Then Yukie laughed and responded, ``Then I'll prepare some side dishes that can be warmed up quickly,`` didn't she?
And then, she ended the conversation by saying this:
...Alright... please, go on ahead...
``?!@k@vS20/40/VTT_miyuki3023. D-Dad, what's wrong?``
``Huh?@k@vS20/13/VTT_akasaka3023. Oh...``
Then, I suddenly came back to my senses.
And that's when I realized... I was crying.
``What is it? Did something happen to Mom?``
``N-no... it's nothing.@k@vS20/13/VTT_akasaka3025. Right, it's nothing...``
I turned to Miyuki who was looking worried and smiled at her while wiping the tears away with my fist.
Then I slipped the pill case into my suit pocket, pulled out a tissue, and blew my nose.
``...Sorry, it's just a small case of allergies.@k@vS20/13/VTT_akasaka3027. I took some medicine earlier, but I guess it's pretty bad out here.``
``...Whaaat? Don't scare me like that.@k@vS20/40/VTT_miyuki3026. I was worried you two got into a big fight.``
Miyuki let out a huge sigh of relief.
...Even though her mouth has gotten sharper as she's grown, that gentle demeanor of hers hasn't changed at all.
And so... I understood, all over again.
That was the reason Sorimachi-kun fell in love with Miyuki, why he proposed to her...
``Anyway, it's about time for our guide to get here.@k@vS20/13/VTT_akasaka3029. The meeting spot is in front of the old bus stop near the entrance of Hinamizawa... umm...``

``Oh, in that case, I came from there a little while ago.@k@vS20/40/VTT_miyuki3028. I need to head back to the Furude Shrine, but I'll show you the way before that.@k@vS20/40/VTT_miyuki3029. Which car is yours, Dad?``
``Hmm? Oh, it's the second black one from the front...@k@vS20/13/VTT_akasaka3031. But what about your car, Miyuki?``

``Oh, about that... I was searching for it a while ago, and finally found it.@k@vS20/40/VTT_miyuki3031. The cargo bay was fine, but the tires, door handles, and all sorts of things were completely trashed...``
``Even if I get it towed home, the repair costs are probably so high I might as well throw it away~, ahahaha...``
``Wha?!@k@vS20/13/VTT_akasaka3033. Isn't that the new car you got just last month?@k@vS20/13/VTT_akasaka3034. You already wrecked it?!``
And what's more, she begged me for an expensive one, so I gave in and covered the down payment.
She really scrapped her car in less than a month? ...I feel a headache coming on.
``...Hey, Dad?@k@vS20/40/VTT_miyuki3034. You think I can claim damages against the Sonozaki Group?``
``...Hell if I know.``
